specific_question: During Q3 2025, what types of IT requests take the longest for employees to resolve on their own?
answer: According to Lee’s Market internal logs from Q3 2025, requests related to online ordering system errors take the longest to resolve, averaging 2.5 hours per incident, due to a lack of clear self-service guidance.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Lee’s Market expand and optimize its IT self-service capabilities to reduce service desk dependency, accelerate resolution times, and improve both employee and customer experience across all stores?
